witness.solution:
import Mathlib

/-! # Finite Ramsey Theorem — Solution (v9) -/

noncomputable def symmetrize {r : ℕ} (C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin r) (i j : ℕ) : Fin r :=
  if i < j then C i j else C j i

@[simp] theorem symmetrize_of_lt {r : ℕ} {C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin r} {i j : ℕ} (h : i < j) :
    symmetrize C i j = C i j := by simp [symmetrize, h]

theorem symmetrize_symm {r : ℕ} (C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin r) (i j : ℕ) :
    symmetrize C i j = symmetrize C j i := by
  unfold symmetrize
  split_ifs with h1 h2 h3
  · omega
  · rfl
  · rfl
  · simp only [show i = j by omega]

theorem symClique_insert {r : ℕ} {C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin r} {c} {S : Finset ℕ} {v : ℕ}
    (hS : ∀ i ∈ S, ∀ j ∈ S, i < j → symmetrize C i j = c)
    (hvS : v ∉ S) (hv : ∀ j ∈ S, symmetrize C v j = c) :
    ∀ i ∈ insert v S, ∀ j ∈ insert v S, i < j → symmetrize C i j = c := by
  intro i hi j hj hlt
  simp only [Finset.mem_insert] at hi hj
  rcases hi with rfl | hiS <;> rcases hj with rfl | hjS
  · exact absurd hlt (by omega)
  · exact hv j hjS
  · rw [symmetrize_symm]; exact hv i hiS
  · exact hS i hiS j hjS hlt

lemma fin2_eq_0_or_1 (x : Fin 2) : x = 0 ∨ x = 1 := by
  fin_cases x <;> simp

-- ============================================================
-- 2-color asymmetric Ramsey (strong: on arbitrary T)
-- ============================================================

noncomputable def R2 : ℕ → ℕ → ℕ
  | 0, _ => 0
  | _, 0 => 0
  | s + 1, t + 1 => R2 s (t + 1) + R2 (s + 1) t + 1

private theorem ramsey2_aux :
    ∀ n s t (_ : s + t = n) (T : Finset ℕ) (C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin 2),
      R2 s t ≤ T.card →
      (∃ S ⊆ T, S.card = s ∧ ∀ i ∈ S, ∀ j ∈ S, i < j → symmetrize C i j = 0) ∨
      (∃ S ⊆ T, S.card = t ∧ ∀ i ∈ S, ∀ j ∈ S, i < j → symmetrize C i j = 1) := by
  intro n
  induction n with
  | zero =>
    intro s t hst T C hcard
    have : s = 0 ∧ t = 0 := by omega
    rcases this with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
    left; exact ⟨∅, Finset.empty_subset T, by simp, by simp⟩
  | succ n ih =>
    intro s t hst T C hcard
    rcases s with _ | s
    · left; exact ⟨∅, Finset.empty_subset T, by simp, by simp⟩
    rcases t with _ | t
    · right; exact ⟨∅, Finset.empty_subset T, by simp, by simp⟩
    simp only [R2] at hcard
    have hne : T.Nonempty := by
      rw [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; intro h; simp [h] at hcard
    classical
    let v := T.min' hne
    have hvT := T.min'_mem hne
    let T' := T.erase v
    have hcardT' : T'.card = T.card - 1 := Finset.card_erase_of_mem hvT
    let T0 := T'.filter fun j => symmetrize C v j = 0
    let T1 := T'.filter fun j => symmetrize C v j = 1
    have hpart : T0 ∪ T1 = T' := by
      ext j
      rw [Finset.mem_union, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_filter]
      constructor
      · rintro (⟨hj, _⟩ | ⟨hj, _⟩) <;> exact hj
      · intro hj
        rcases fin2_eq_0_or_1 (symmetrize C v j) with h | h
        · exact Or.inl ⟨hj, h⟩
        · exact Or.inr ⟨hj, h⟩
    have hdisj : Disjoint T0 T1 := by
      rw [Finset.disjoint_left]; intro j h0 h1
      simp [T0, T1] at h0 h1; omega
    have hsum : T0.card + T1.card = T'.card := by
      rw [← Finset.card_union_of_disjoint hdisj, hpart]
    by_cases h0 : R2 s (t + 1) ≤ T0.card
    · rcases ih s (t + 1) (by omega) T0 C h0 with
        ⟨S, hSsub, hScard, hSmono⟩ | ⟨S, hSsub, hScard, hSmono⟩
      · left; refine ⟨insert v S, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
        · intro j hj; simp only [Finset.mem_insert] at hj
          rcases hj with rfl | hjS
          · exact hvT
          · exact Finset.erase_subset v T (Finset.mem_filter.mp (hSsub hjS)).1
        · have hvS : v ∉ S := fun h => Finset.notMem_erase v T (Finset.mem_filter.mp (hSsub h)).1
          rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem hvS, hScard]
        · apply symClique_insert hSmono (fun h => Finset.notMem_erase v T (Finset.mem_filter.mp (hSsub h)).1)
          intro j hj; exact (Finset.mem_filter.mp (hSsub hj)).2
      · right; exact ⟨S, hSsub.trans ((Finset.filter_subset ..).trans (Finset.erase_subset v T)), hScard, hSmono⟩
    · have h1 : R2 (s + 1) t ≤ T1.card := by
        have h0' := Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_not_le h0)
        omega
      rcases ih (s + 1) t (by omega) T1 C h1 with
        ⟨S, hSsub, hScard, hSmono⟩ | ⟨S, hSsub, hScard, hSmono⟩
      · left; exact ⟨S, hSsub.trans ((Finset.filter_subset ..).trans (Finset.erase_subset v T)), hScard, hSmono⟩
      · right; refine ⟨insert v S, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
        · intro j hj; simp only [Finset.mem_insert] at hj
          rcases hj with rfl | hjS
          · exact hvT
          · exact Finset.erase_subset v T (Finset.mem_filter.mp (hSsub hjS)).1
        · have hvS : v ∉ S := fun h => Finset.notMem_erase v T (Finset.mem_filter.mp (hSsub h)).1
          rw [Finset.card_insert_of_notMem hvS, hScard]
        · apply symClique_insert hSmono (fun h => Finset.notMem_erase v T (Finset.mem_filter.mp (hSsub h)).1)
          intro j hj; exact (Finset.mem_filter.mp (hSsub hj)).2

-- ============================================================
-- r-color Ramsey (strong version on arbitrary T)
-- ============================================================

noncomputable def rBound : ℕ → ℕ → ℕ
  | 0, _ => 0
  | _, 0 => 0
  | 1, k => k
  | r + 2, k + 1 => R2 (rBound (r + 1) (k + 1)) (k + 1)

def finUp {r : ℕ} (c : Fin (r + 1)) : Fin (r + 2) := ⟨c.val, by omega⟩

def splitColor {r : ℕ} (C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin (r + 2)) (i j : ℕ) : Fin 2 :=
  if (C i j).val = r + 1 then 1 else 0

def reduceColor {r : ℕ} (C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin (r + 2)) (i j : ℕ) : Fin (r + 1) :=
  if h : (C i j).val < r + 1 then ⟨(C i j).val, h⟩ else 0

-- When splitColor gives 0, C(i,j).val < r+1
lemma split_zero_imp_lt {r : ℕ} {C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin (r + 2)} {i j : ℕ}
    (h : splitColor C i j = 0) : (C i j).val < r + 1 := by
  unfold splitColor at h
  by_cases heq : (C i j).val = r + 1
  · simp [heq] at h
  · have := (C i j).isLt; omega

-- When splitColor gives 1, C(i,j) = ⟨r+1, ...⟩
lemma split_one_imp_eq {r : ℕ} {C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin (r + 2)} {i j : ℕ}
    (h : splitColor C i j = 1) : (C i j).val = r + 1 := by
  unfold splitColor at h
  by_cases heq : (C i j).val = r + 1
  · exact heq
  · simp [heq] at h

lemma split_one_eq_last {r : ℕ} {C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin (r + 2)} {i j : ℕ}
    (h : splitColor C i j = 1) : C i j = ⟨r + 1, by omega⟩ := by
  have := split_one_imp_eq h; ext; simp; exact this

lemma reduceColor_of_lt {r : ℕ} {C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin (r + 2)} {i j : ℕ}
    (h : (C i j).val < r + 1) : reduceColor C i j = ⟨(C i j).val, h⟩ := by
  simp [reduceColor, h]

-- When symmetrize (splitColor C) i j = 0 and i < j, splitColor C i j = 0
lemma sym_splitColor_zero {r : ℕ} {C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin (r + 2)} {i j : ℕ}
    (hlt : i < j) (h : symmetrize (splitColor C) i j = 0) :
    splitColor C i j = 0 := by rwa [symmetrize_of_lt hlt] at h

-- When symmetrize (splitColor C) i j = 1 and i < j, splitColor C i j = 1
lemma sym_splitColor_one {r : ℕ} {C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin (r + 2)} {i j : ℕ}
    (hlt : i < j) (h : symmetrize (splitColor C) i j = 1) :
    splitColor C i j = 1 := by rwa [symmetrize_of_lt hlt] at h

-- When symmetrize (reduceColor C) i j = c' and i < j, reduceColor C i j = c'
lemma sym_reduceColor_eq {r : ℕ} {C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin (r + 2)} {i j : ℕ} {c' : Fin (r + 1)}
    (hlt : i < j) (h : symmetrize (reduceColor C) i j = c') :
    reduceColor C i j = c' := by rwa [symmetrize_of_lt hlt] at h

private theorem ramsey_strong :
    ∀ r k (T : Finset ℕ) (C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin r), rBound r k ≤ T.card →
      ∃ (c : Fin r) (S : Finset ℕ), S ⊆ T ∧ S.card = k ∧
        ∀ i ∈ S, ∀ j ∈ S, i < j → symmetrize C i j = c := by
  intro r
  induction r with
  | zero =>
    intro k T C h; exact absurd (C 0 0).isLt (by omega)
  | succ r ih =>
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      intro T C h; exact ⟨0, ∅, Finset.empty_subset T, by simp, by simp⟩
    | succ k ihk =>
      rcases r with _ | r
      · -- Fin 1
        intro T C h
        have hle : k + 1 ≤ T.card := by simp [rBound] at h; exact h
        obtain ⟨S, hSsub, hScard⟩ := Finset.exists_subset_card_eq hle
        exact ⟨0, S, hSsub, hScard, by intro i hi j hj hlt; exact Fin.eq_zero _⟩
      · -- Fin (r+2), k+1
        intro T C hcard
        simp only [rBound] at hcard
        -- 2-color split
        have h2 := ramsey2_aux (rBound (r + 1) (k + 1) + (k + 1))
          (rBound (r + 1) (k + 1)) (k + 1) rfl T (splitColor C) hcard
        rcases h2 with ⟨S, hSsub, hScard, hSmono⟩ | ⟨S, hSsub, hScard, hSmono⟩
        · -- Red case: all edges in S have symmetrize (splitColor C) = 0
          obtain ⟨c', S', hS'_sub, hS'_card, hS'_mono⟩ :=
            ih (k + 1) S (reduceColor C) hScard.symm.le
          refine ⟨finUp c', S', hS'_sub.trans hSsub, hS'_card, ?_⟩
          intro i hi j hj hlt
          -- Get facts from the two cliques
          have hsplit0 := sym_splitColor_zero hlt (hSmono i (hS'_sub hi) j (hS'_sub hj) hlt)
          have hlt2 : (C i j).val < r + 1 := split_zero_imp_lt hsplit0
          have hred_eq := sym_reduceColor_eq hlt (hS'_mono i hi j hj hlt)
          have hred0 : reduceColor C i j = c' := hred_eq
          rw [reduceColor_of_lt hlt2] at hred0
          rw [symmetrize_of_lt hlt]
          have hval : (C i j).val = c'.val := Fin.ext_iff.mp hred0
          exact Fin.eq_of_val_eq hval
        · -- Blue case: all edges in S have symmetrize (splitColor C) = 1
          refine ⟨⟨r + 1, by omega⟩, S, hSsub, hScard, ?_⟩
          intro i hi j hj hlt
          have hsplit1 := sym_splitColor_one hlt (hSmono i hi j hj hlt)
          rw [symmetrize_of_lt hlt]
          exact split_one_eq_last hsplit1

-- Final theorem
theorem ramsey (r k : ℕ) :
    ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ C : ℕ → ℕ → Fin r, ∃ (c : Fin r) (S : Finset ℕ),
      S.card = k ∧ (∀ n ∈ S, n < N) ∧
      ∀ i ∈ S, ∀ j ∈ S, i < j → C i j = c := by
  refine ⟨rBound r k, fun C => ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨c, S, hSsub, hScard, hSmono⟩ :=
    ramsey_strong r k (Finset.Ico 0 (rBound r k)) C (by simp)
  refine ⟨c, S, hScard, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n hn; have := hSsub hn; simp only [Finset.mem_Ico] at this; exact this.2
  · intro i hi j hj hlt
    have := hSmono i hi j hj hlt; rwa [symmetrize_of_lt hlt] at this
